subject: fix(ui): increase touch targets on new UI components to meet WCAG 2.5.5
body:
- ConfirmDialog: increase button padding from py-2 (~32px) to py-2.5
  (~40px) for reliable touch targeting on mobile
- FormListPage: increase Import and New Form button padding from py-2
  to py-2.5, matching other CTA buttons in the app

Tags: accessibility, mobile, touch-targets
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
